news.title:
Sensex surged 2,989 pts, Nifty gained 890 pts as RBI held repo rate at 5.25%.
Bank, auto, realty stocks led gains; Axis Bank, Maruti Suzuki, and Prestige Estates rose sharply.
news.summary:
Sensex surged 2,989 pts, Nifty gained 890 pts as RBI held repo rate at 5.25%.
Bank, auto, realty stocks led gains; Axis Bank, Maruti Suzuki, and Prestige Estates rose sharply.

news.title:
Nirmal Bang lowers target prices for banks and NBFCs ahead of Q4 FY26 results; expects net profit growth of 8% YoY.
Top picks include SBI, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, Federal Bank, Can Fin Homes, with focus on loan growth, NIMs, and asset quality.
news.summary:
Nirmal Bang lowers target prices for banks and NBFCs ahead of Q4 FY26 results; expects net profit growth of 8% YoY.
Top picks include SBI, HDFC Bank, Axis Bank, Federal Bank, Can Fin Homes, with focus on loan growth, NIMs, and asset quality.

news.title:
Bank Nifty poised for a 3-4% rally amid ceasefire and RBI policy decision, likely outperforming Nifty50.
Key stocks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, SBI, and Axis Bank may benefit; RBI expected to hold rates at 5.25%.
news.summary:

news.title:
Axis Bank shows bullish EMA crossover, upward sloping averages, and higher highs.
RSI above 50 with increased volume on up days signals positive momentum.

news.title:
Experts recommend 6 stocks for the short term, including Axis Bank, Nykaa, Coal India, Wipro, Trent, and CCL Products.
Key targets: Axis Bank (₹1,343-1,365), Nykaa (₹275-282), Coal India (₹500), Wipro (₹220), Trent (₹4,100), CCL (₹1,210-1,240).

news.title:
Markets rallied for the third session; Nifty ended at 22,968, led by banks.
Axis, HDFC Bank rose on Q4 growth; Trent, Senco surged on strong revenues.

news.title:
Axis Bank faces criticism over customer service post-Citibank India acquisition worth Rs 11,603 crore in 2023.
Complaints cite poor integration, unresolved issues, and decline in service quality, raising long-term success concerns.
news.summary:

news.title:
Ambit Capital warns Iran conflict may cap credit growth at 10-12% by FY27, impacting margins and asset quality.
Private banks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Axis Bank are better positioned due to stronger fundamentals.
news.summary:
Ambit Capital warns Iran conflict may cap credit growth at 10-12% by FY27, impacting margins and asset quality.

news.title:

news.title:
ICICI Securities prefers large private banks like HDFC, Kotak, Axis, citing strong balance sheets and attractive risk-reward ratios.
RBL, Bandhan, City Union, Karur Vysya, DCB, South Indian Bank rated 'Buy'; SME vulnerability and geopolitical risks monitored.

news.title:
Nifty Bank rebounded over 1,600 points last Thursday, ending above 51,000. Watch closely as 12 constituents reported Q4 updates.
HDFC Bank saw 12% loan growth; Axis Bank's loans grew 18.3%; IDFC First Bank posted 20% growth; IndusInd Bank saw an 8.7% decline.
news.summary:
Nifty Bank rebounded over 1,600 points last Thursday, ending above 51,000. Watch closely as 12 constituents reported Q4 updates.
HDFC Bank saw 12% loan growth; Axis Bank's loans grew 18.3%; IDFC First Bank posted 20% growth; IndusInd Bank saw an 8.7% decline.

Key stocks to watch: HDFC Bank, Kotak Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Dabur.

news.title:

Traders may still rely on offshore markets for pricing signals despite tightened FX rules.

news.title:

CASA deposits increased 7.3% QoQ; shares closed 0.42% higher at ₹1198.1 on NSE.

Overall investment banking fees in India fell 31% to $231.4M.

news.title:
Jefferies prefers banks like SBI, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank over auto stocks, citing stable asset quality and credit growth.
Nifty target set at 25,000 with 10% upside; bull case sees 28,000 (+23%) if geopolitical risks ease and oil prices normalize.

news.title:

HDFC Bank, ICICI, Axis, SBI, Bajaj Finance, & others see reduced targets; LIC Housing noted as defensive.

news.title:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bank Nifty drops 2% as banking stocks, including Axis, Kotak, and IDFC First, fall post-RBI rupee position cap.
RBI mandates banks to limit net open rupee positions to $100M daily by April 10, 2026, causing market unwinding.
news.summary:
Bank Nifty drops 2% as banking stocks, including Axis, Kotak, and IDFC First, fall post-RBI rupee position cap.
RBI mandates banks to limit net open rupee positions to $100M daily by April 10, 2026, causing market unwinding.

news.title:
Axis Bank drops up to 3% on fears of Rs 4,000 crore losses.
RBI's forex clampdown triggers concerns over mark-to-market losses.
news.summary:
